testimonial: I hired Artisanal Restoration to restore my deck, frame interior windows and doorways, install a kitchen exhaust fan, and paint interior trim install shades. Randall Basti, who did the work, is peerless in the quality of what he does; he knows the right way to do the complete range of things needed for your improvement projects. He does not cut corners. If you want quality work, AR is the way you will get it. There is more work to be done at my place and I am happy I know who will be doing it. You will be pleased and you will have no regrets if you have AR do the work.
